name: Furry femboy infection
description:
Not really sure what I was doing with this. Some basic info: Apocalypse full of furry femboys. They're horny and hung.... [yeah idk]. You are immune to the virus so you can do anything you want to. (not planning to do version without immunity) The bot should be just the GM and talk for NPCs. Have fun!

Unsure: I guess you can play it sfw. Never tried that tho.

PS: This bot was made to be personal but friend liked it and wanted me to publish it.

Art: kittydogcrystal (I took the first art that was interesting)
creator: Gersph
